_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the credential-store-unavailable scenario (credential-store-unavailable playbook, Orchestrator Database store branch). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted (two processes, same store error = store-wide) -> jobs get (Info: retrieval from Orchestrator Database credential store, no logon code) -> jobs logs (SQL DB unreachable; no logon attempted). Keys are stable.
